title: OpenGo Copilot Custom Model Configuration
description: Schema for defining custom LLM models in settings.json

id.description: Unique model identifier used in API requests

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in the model picker

contextWindow.description: Maximum context window size in tokens

apiFormat.description: API format used by this model

supportsVision.description: Whether the model supports image inputs

supportsTools.description: Whether the model supports function calling

fixedTemperature.description: If set, overrides any user temperature preference

reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort level for thinking models

endpoint.description: Optional override for the API base URL
